desc:
Bug 1810810 - Add test for login preselection. r=mtigley,credential-management-reviewers

Depends on D167259

Differential Revision: https://phabricator.services.mozilla.com/D177980

lines.l: @@ -100,17 +100,16 @@ export default class LoginList extends H
// A map of login GUID -> {login, listItem}.
// A map of section header -> sectionItem
@@ -851,22 +850,28 @@ export default class LoginList extends H
* Selects the first visible login as part of the initial load of the page,
* which will bypass any focus changes that occur during manual login
+    }, "Waiting for TEST_LOGIN1 to be selected for the login-item view");
-      "Waiting for TEST_LOGIN1 to be selected for the login-item view"
"login-item should be visible when a login is selected"
"The 'alerts' option should be visible after adding a vulnerable login to the list"
"waiting for sort to get updated to 'alerts'"
`The previous login-list-item must be vulnerable or breached if the current one is (second window, i=${i})`
"The 'alerts' option should be visible after adding a vulnerable login to the list"
"waiting for sort to get updated to 'alerts'"
*                 The name of the entry point, used for telemetry
// If no loginGuid is set, get sanitized origin, this will return null for about:* uris
+    "Wait for login item to be selected"
+        "First item of the list is selected when random hash is supplied."
+          "Gear icon should not be visible initially"
+          "Wait for second login to become active"
+          "Gear icon should be visible when login item is active"
